title: Ubiquiti AI PTZ Precision - 8MP PTZ IP Camera, Black
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti AI PTZ Precision is a device from the Enterprise series designed for enterprise environments The camera features an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps, a varifocal lens (31x optical zoom), and adaptive IR illumination for night vision up to 100 meters. The camera has a durable housing made of aluminum and polycarbonate, with IP66 protection against dust and powerful water jets. It connects to the network via Gigabit LAN with PoE support (42 to 57V DC) and a maximum power consumption of 51W 4K (8MP), 30 FPS video (3840 x 2160px) Advanced AI detection of various objects and events LiDAR for faster autofocus Night mode with IR LEDs and IR cut filter IP66 weather-resistant housing Power via PoE (42 to 57V DC) Compatible with the AI Horn Speaker Managed through UniFi Protect software Black color Device Screws, wall plugs Wall / Pole / Desk mount brackets
